program.name: Federal Child Tax Credit (CTC)
program.description_short: Federal tax credit for families with children or other dependents
program.description:
The Child Tax Credit lowers the amount you owe on your federal taxes. You can claim one credit for each qualifying child in your household.

You claim the credit when you file your federal tax return. If it is larger than what you owe, you get the difference back as a refund by direct deposit or check.

Each qualifying child must be a U.S. citizen or resident and have a Social Security number. Higher incomes may reduce your credit amount. A free tax preparer can help confirm what you qualify for.

To claim this credit, click "File for free" to file your federal tax return at no cost.
program.website_description: Federal tax credit for families with children or other dependents

documents.text: Social Security card for each qualifying child
Proof of identity (e.g. driver's license, state ID, passport)
Form W-2 for all household members in tax unit
1099 for all household members in tax unit
Schedule 8812 (Credits for Qualifying Children and Other Dependents)
